title: Phase 1A: Tailwind v4, design tokens, and shadcn/ui primitives
description: Configure Tailwind CSS v4 with design tokens via CSS variables matching the industrial-utilitarian aesthetic. Install all required shadcn/ui primitive components.
steps: Configure tailwind.config.ts with custom theme (deep slate/zinc base, orange/amber accents)
Set up src/app/globals.css with CSS variable design tokens for colors, spacing, typography
Configure JetBrains Mono for data display and Instrument Sans for UI text
Install shadcn/ui primitives: Button, Card, Dialog, Table, Tabs, Select, Input, Badge, Toast
Install shadcn/ui primitives: Sheet, Command, Popover, Calendar, DropdownMenu, Avatar
Install shadcn/ui primitives: Separator, ScrollArea, Checkbox, RadioGroup, Switch, Tooltip
Install shadcn/ui primitives: AlertDialog, Form, Label, Textarea
Verify all components render with correct theme tokens
